creator: nc@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 232621
Patch (revision 1)

I have a patch you could use, but one thing you can do is:

 * `git rm -r` the port directory

 * Edit the category's Makefile (e.g. /usr/ports/devel/Makefile) and remove the port you want to delete.

 * Add the entry to /usr/ports/MOVED
